description: Seed golden test for Lease Agreement
parsed_text:
LEASE AGREEMENT
Lease Date: 2026-07-01
Landlord: Lakeshore Industrial Owner LLC
Tenant: Northstar Cold Storage LLC
Property: 1440 River Road, Joliet, IL 60431
Premises: Suite 200, approximately 85,000 rentable square feet of refrigerated warehouse space
Commencement Date: 2026-08-01
Expiration Date: 2031-07-31
Base Rent: $74,375.00 per month
Security Deposit: $148,750.00
Renewal Options: one 5-year renewal at fair market rent
Permitted Use: refrigerated warehousing, distribution, and ancillary office use
CAM/Operating Expenses: tenant pays pro rata share of taxes, insurance, utilities, and common area maintenance
Guarantors: Northstar Holdings Inc.
Assignment/Subletting: landlord consent required, not to be unreasonably withheld
Governing Law: Illinois
